title: AI Summary Field - No Results
excerpt: I have instigated an AI Summarize Updates column but I’m getting a few results that are showing “No results – the provided text is too long”. I’m trialling this on a board that has relatively low amount of updates so it …

posts.author: darrylclark (Darryl)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have instigated an AI Summarize Updates column but I’m getting a few results that are showing “No results – the provided text is too long”. I’m trialling this on a board that has relatively low amount of updates so it concerns me that if I paid for credits and unleashed it on my “big update” boards they would all not work.

I can’t find anything that says there is a limit on update length or number of updates but surely the whole idea is to summarize long text in to manageable chunks.

We use the update via email functionality and keep the address on CC on all of our comms so the updates can get quite lengthy on long projects. I’m guessing some other uses do it this way too so I’m hoping we aren’t alone
